```hcl
  name              = "PizzaOrderingBotForKids"

  name = "OrderPizza"

  sample_utterances = [

    "Pizza, please",
    "I'd like to order pizza",
    "Order me a pizza"
  ]

  slots = []
}

  name = "GreetingIntent"

  sample_utterances = [
    "Hello",
    "Hi",
    "Hey",
    "Good morning",
    "Good afternoon",
    "Greetings"
  ]

  slots = []
}

resource "aws_lex_intent" "fallback" {
  name = "FallbackIntent"

  sample_utterances = [
    "I don't know",
    "I didn't understand",
    "Huh?",
    "What?"
  ]

  slots = []
```
}

```hcl
}

  ]
```
```hcl
}

}
```

Request:
 creates a MySQL database instance on AWS RDS with a public access security group and a randomly generated password.

Please generate the Terraform configuration for the following request. 
Provide the code in HCL format within a Markdown code block (using ```hcl).
Do not include any additional explanation unless necessary for understanding the code.

Request:
 creates a 200 GB 5.7 MySQL database instance on AWS RDS with db.t3.micro instance class, a public access security group and a randomly generated password.
response:
```hcl
resource "random_password" "db_password" {
  length           = 16
  special          = true
  override_special = "!@#$%^&*()"
}

resource "aws_db_instance" "default" {
  allocated_storage    = 200
  engine               = "mysql"
  engine_version       = "5.7"
  instance_class       = "db.t3.micro"
  name                 = "mydb"
  username             = "admin"
  password             = random_password.db_password.result
  db_subnet_group_name = aws_db_subnet_group.default.name
  vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.public_access.id]
  publicly_accessible  = true
  skip_final_snapshot  = true
}

resource "aws_db_subnet_group" "default" {
  name       = "mydb-subnet-group"
  subnet_ids = [
    "subnet-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx", # Replace with your actual subnet IDs
    "subnet-yyyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy", # Replace with your actual subnet IDs
  ]
}

resource "aws_security_group" "public_access" {
  name        = "db-public-access"
  description = "Allow public access to MySQL"
  vpc_id      = "vpc-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx" # Replace with your actual VPC ID

  ingress {
    from_port   = 3306
    to_port     = 3306
    protocol    = "tcp"
    cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
  }

  egress {
    from_port   = 0
    to_port     = 0
    protocol    = "-1"
    cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"]
  }
}
```

Request:
generate a Load Balancer with a target group
response:
```hcl
resource "aws_lb" "example" {
  name               = "example-lb"
  internal           = false
  load_balancer_type = "application"
  security_groups    = [] # Replace with your security groups

  enable_deletion_protection = false

  subnets = [] # Replace with your subnet IDs
}

resource "aws_lb_target_group" "example" {
  name     = "example-tg"
  port     = 80
  protocol = "HTTP"
  vpc_id   = "" # Replace with your VPC ID

  health_check {
    path = "/"
    port = "traffic_port"
    protocol = "HTTP"
    interval = 30
    timeout = 5
    healthy_threshold = 2
    unhealthy_threshold = 2
  }
}

resource "aws_lb_listener" "example" {
  load_balancer_arn = aws_lb.example.arn
  port              = "80"
  protocol          = "HTTP"

  default_action {
    type             = "forward"
    target_group_arn = aws_lb_target_group.example.arn
  }
}
```

```hcl
    to_port     = 3306
```
